title: 7 Things a Man of God Does Before Anyone Calls Him a Leader
caption:
Leadership isn't a title you get. It's a pattern of behavior that earns one.

He shows up when there's no reason anyone would know he came. Faithfulness without an audience is the first credential.

He keeps the promise he made when no one reminded him. Reliable in small things first — that's the whole test.

He apologizes to the person below him in the room. The man who won't do this can't be trusted with anyone above him.

He does the work no one wanted and doesn't mention it. Service with a record of it is still self-promotion.

He prays for the people he disagrees with. By name. In private. You can't intercede for someone and keep contempt for them at the same time.

He asks for help when he's in over his head. The man who can name his limits is stronger than the one performing like he has none.

And he submits to a man he respects. The man who won't be led cannot be trusted to lead.

Save this for the man who wants the role but hasn't built the pattern.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #servantleadership #christianity #formation
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
